comment.body: I've been here since day 5 I think. My approach is more longer-term binary play (I play directionally; Alma would say options are for vol trades, but I think also for binary bets, provided your assumed probability distribution is way different from what market prices in). Can someone explain why are we so keen in spotting the moment to short SPX, which is statistically like 75% of time goind up? Are we getting a special badge for that? :)

comment.body:
Good point and article says later this year. Matches strongly with Alma's overall outlook after-market ripping after any brief fall in the upcoming next 2 weeks. Practically speaking Trump 2.0 is same as Trump 1.0 and the guy telegraphs his moves clearly.
